3098670.name: Yoga: Follow Me
3098670.description:
🌿 Yoga: Follow Me（Now playable in both PC and VR!）

Yoga: Follow Me is a yoga-inspired learning experience designed for comfort, clarity, and natural motion.
Practice at your own pace with a virtual instructor, guided replay tools, and calming environments that support focus and relaxation.

The app includes three difficulty levels:

  • Beginner – Gentle, easy-to-follow poses

  • Intermediate – Moderate sequences to improve flexibility

  • Advanced – More challenging movements for experienced users

Across all levels, you’ll learn around 80 yoga poses, stretches, and sequence-based exercises, suitable for daily practice or focused skill improvement.

🖥️ PC & 🥽 VR — Included with One Purchase

This game includes both PC and VR versions under a single purchase.

  • You only need to buy the game once to access both.

  • Play Your Way:

    When launching the game from the Steam Client, you’ll be prompted to choose between PC (Desktop) Mode or VR Mode.

✨ Key Features

👀 Interactive Virtual Instructor

Rotate the virtual instructor to any angle with a simple swipe. Observe each pose from the perspective that works best for you — similar to learning with a personal tutor.

🐼 Slow-Motion Replay

Replay movements in slow motion to study form and transitions in detail, refine technique step by step.

⏩ Fast-Forward & Rewind

Jump to specific sections of a sequence or rewind the current movement without restarting the entire form. Ideal for practicing individual poses or transitions.

🌄 Immersive Environments & Music

Choose from 20+ calming environments, including mountains, rivers, oceans, and grasslands. Each scene is paired with relaxing background music to help you stay focused and centered. Switch environments and music instantly with a single tap.

🌟 Safety Note

For the best experience, make sure you have enough space while using VR, move at your own pace, and stop if anything feels uncomfortable. This app is for instructional purposes only and is not a substitute for professional medical advice — enjoy your yoga practice safely!
